  "findings": [
    "Stressing tendons before concrete compressive strength has been verified by cylinder tests",
    "Sequence violation of post-tensioning operations",
    "Risk of structural blowout or anchorage zone failure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all stressing operations immediately",
    "Verify concrete compressive strength via field-cured cylinder breaks",
    "Inspect anchorage zones for cracking or distress",
    "Obtain engineer of record and third-party inspector approval before resuming"
  ],
  "rationale": "Stressing post-tensioning tendons before the concrete has reached the specified compressive strength (typically 3,000 psi minimum or as specified by the EOR) violates PTI specifications and building codes, posing an immediate risk of catastrophic anchorage zone failure.",
  "references": [
    "PTI Specification for Unbonded Single-Strand Tendons",
    "ACI 318 Chapter 26"
  ]
}
